attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.AMOUNT_REMAINING, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.BATCH_ID, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.CHECKRUN_ID, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.CREATED_BY, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.CREATION_DATE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_REMAINING, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.DISCOUNT_DATE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.DUE_DATE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.FUTURE_PAY_DUE_DATE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.GROSS_AMOUNT, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.HOLD_FLAG, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.INV_CURR_GROSS_AMOUNT, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.INVOICE_ID, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.ORG_ID, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.PAYMENT_CROSS_RATE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.PAYMENT_NUM, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.PAYMENT_PRIORITY, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.PAYMENT_STATUS_FLAG, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.SECOND_DISCOUNT_DATE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.SECOND_DISC_AMT_AVAILABLE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.THIRD_DISCOUNT_DATE, MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.THIRD_DISC_AMT_AVAILABLE 
FROM
 MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL where MF_AP_PAYMENT_SCHEDU_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
